messages.content:
Palladium is added to polyvinyl siloxane to:

Select only one

A. Act as a scavenger                               
B. Helps as surfactant
C. Acts as plasticizer                                  
D. Acts as a catalyst

Which one is the chemical formula of Gypsum ?

Select only one

A. Calcium hydroxide
B. Calcium phosphate
C. Calcium sulfate dihydrate
D. Calcium sulfate hemihydrate

disadvantage of polysulphide rubber impression material  is the higher stiffness

Select only one

A. true
B. false

All of the following factors increase setting time OF gypsum Except 

Select only one

A. Increase W/P ratio 
B. Decrease water temperature
C. Adding small amount of Na Cl  to the mix
D. Cotamination of impression with saliva and blood
C. Adding small amount of Na Cl to the mix.

Surfactant is added to condensation silicone.

Select only one

A. true
B. false

Polysulfide impression materials set by addition polymerization reaction.

Select only one

A. true
B. false

Type II gypsum product is produced by   ......................................

Select only one

A. Heating gypsum at 120 oC in open air
B. Heating gypsum at 125 oC under steam pressure (autoclaving)
C. Crystallization process
D. Boiling gypsum in 30% Mg Cl solution
B. Heating gypsum at 125 oC under steam pressure (autoclaving)

Type V gypsum product is used for ......................................

Select only one

A. Final impression for edentulus patient
B. Mounting casts on articulators
C. pulp capping materials 
D. As binder for gypsum bonded investment materials
D. As binder for gypsum bonded investment materials

Polysulfied impression can be copper electoplated 

Select only one

A. true
B. false
